name: Pipedrive API
what_it_does: Sales-focused CRM API for managing deals, contacts, activities, and pipelines, designed for sales teams needing a straightforward pipeline view.
use_cases: Creating and progressing deals through sales pipeline
Contact and organization management from agent workflows
not_for: Free CRM needs (no meaningful free tier)
best_when: A sales-focused agent needs to manage a simple, visual pipeline without enterprise CRM complexity.
avoid_when: You need marketing automation, support ticketing, or enterprise compliance requirements.

auth.notes: API token for server-to-server access, OAuth2 for user-context apps. API token is simpler for agents. Available in user profile settings.

pricing.notes: 14-day free trial only. No permanent free tier. Reasonably priced compared to Salesforce.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean JSON error responses with descriptive messages. Pagination metadata is well-documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency support. Each POST creates a new record.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit of 100 req/2s can be hit by agents processing large contact imports
No MCP server - agents must use REST API
Custom fields require knowing field keys (not human names) - must query schema first
Deal stages are pipeline-specific - agents need to know pipeline ID first
No free tier after trial - agents in test environments need paid account

security_score_components.security_notes: API token per user. OAuth2 for apps. SOC2 Type II, ISO27001. CRM contact data is PII — GDPR, CCPA apply. Webhook HMAC validation.
